*** Best

EGA
MIN/MAX 15,000 MT ALUMINUM METALS
LOAD PORT: PORT KHALIFA

10 – 14 Jan, 2025

Routing via RED SEA, but also please offer basis COGH

-  PREFERENCE FOR BOXY HOLDS
